title: Daily Bible Verses with Verse Text and Encouragement Footnotes
description: A date-based Bible verse JSON list for every calendar date, including February 29. Each entry includes month, date, testament, reference, verse text, theme, and an encouragement footnote of at least 50 words.
translation_note: Verse text uses public-domain KJV-style wording.
